about.title: Empowering Organizations with
about.subtitle: We're on a mission to make credentials verifiable, shareable, and truly owned by the people who earn them
about.heroDesc: We're on a mission to make every credential verifiable, shareable, and truly owned by the people who earn them.
about.storyP1: Founded in Cologne, Germany, CredSure was born from the conviction that credentials should be more than paper certificates. Our founders — Tim Miller and Markus Dohm — saw organisations worldwide still relying on manual, fraud-prone processes to verify qualifications.
about.storyP2: They set out to build a platform that leverages blockchain technology, making every certificate tamper-proof, instantly verifiable, and shareable across the digital world. Today, CredSure serves universities, corporate training programmes, and certification bodies across 30+ countries.
about.valueTrustedDesc: Every credential is secured on the blockchain, ensuring tamper-proof verification that organisations and recipients can rely on.
about.valueDataControlDesc: Recipients own their credentials. Full GDPR compliance ensures data privacy and individual control over personal achievements.
about.valueTransparentDesc: Open verification means anyone can confirm a credential's authenticity — no phone calls, no emails, just instant proof.
about.valueQuickVerificationDesc: Verify any credential in seconds. Our technology eliminates the days-long manual verification process entirely.
about.blockchainP1: Blockchain technology makes credentials immutable and universally verifiable. Once a certificate is issued on the CredSure platform, it cannot be altered, forged, or revoked without a transparent audit trail.
about.blockchainP2: This creates a global trust layer for education and professional development — where every achievement is permanently recorded and instantly accessible to anyone who needs to verify it.
about.teamDesc: Our leadership team brings decades of experience in edtech, enterprise software, and digital identity.
about.teamTimBio: Serial entrepreneur with 20+ years in digital transformation. Tim leads CredSure's vision to become the global standard for verifiable credentials.
about.teamMarkusBio: Expert in quality management and certification processes. Markus brings deep industry knowledge from TÜV Rheinland to CredSure's product strategy.
about.teamMikeBio: Operations leader with extensive experience scaling SaaS platforms across global markets. Mike drives CredSure's growth and customer success.
about.ctaDesc: Join hundreds of organisations issuing blockchain-verified digital certificates with CredSure.
about.missionDesc: To create a world where every achievement is instantly verifiable and universally recognised.
about.visionDesc: A global standard for digital certificates that empowers individuals and organisations.
about.valuesDesc: Innovation, security, and customer success drive everything we do.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade
security.subtitle: Your credentials and data are protected by bank-level security standards trusted by 150+ organizations worldwide.
security.encryption: AES-256 Encryption at Rest & in Transit
security.encryptionDesc: All credential data is encrypted with AES-256 in our databases and protected with TLS 1.3 in transit. Cryptographic hashes are anchored to a public blockchain for tamper-proof verification.
security.soc2Desc: Independently audited controls over security, availability, and confidentiality. Our processes are reviewed annually by accredited third-party auditors.
security.gdprDesc: Full compliance with EU data protection regulations. EU-based data residency available, complete data portability, and the right to erasure honoured at the click of a button.

gdpr.title: GDPR Compliance
gdpr.subtitle: How CredSure protects personal data and supports your obligations under the EU General Data Protection Regulation.
items: Lawful basis: We only process personal data with explicit consent or to fulfil a contractual obligation.
Data minimisation: We collect only the personal data strictly necessary to issue and verify a credential.
EU-based data residency available — all credential data can be stored exclusively within the European Economic Area.
Right to access: Data subjects can request a complete export of their data at any time.
Right to erasure: Recipients can request deletion of their personal data; we honour requests within 30 days.
Right to portability: Credentials can be exported in JSON, PDF, and Open Badges 3.0 formats.
Sub-processor transparency: A current list of all sub-processors is published and updated quarterly.
Data Processing Agreement (DPA): Available for all paid plans on request.
Breach notification: Customers are informed within 72 hours of any confirmed personal data breach.
Regular audits: Annual penetration testing and ISO 27001 audits validate our security posture.

byteedge.title: How ByteEDGE
byteedge.subtitle: A leading microlearning platform issued 10,000+ blockchain-verified certificates in the first year — with zero fraud and 98% recipient engagement.
byteedge.aboutP1: ByteEDGE is a fast-growing microlearning platform serving enterprise clients across Asia and Europe. Their bite-sized learning modules cover compliance, leadership, and technical skills for over half a million learners.
byteedge.aboutP2: As ByteEDGE scaled, the team realised their PDF certificates were being shared inconsistently, often forged, and rarely engaged with on social platforms — leaving valuable brand reach on the table.
byteedge.quote: CredSure gave us blockchain-grade trust without engineering overhead. We were issuing verifiable credentials within a single sprint.
byteedge.challengeDesc: PDF certificates created friction for both learners and verifiers. Recipients couldn't easily share their achievements, employers couldn't verify them quickly, and the team faced rising fraud reports.
byteedge.solutionDesc: ByteEDGE integrated CredSure's API with their LMS in two weeks. Every completion now triggers a blockchain-anchored credential, automatically branded, and shareable to LinkedIn with one click.
challenges: PDF certificates easily forged or duplicated
No way for employers to verify in real time
Low share rate on social platforms
Manual reissue process consuming admin time
solutions: Self-service learner portal with instant download
byteedge.ctaDesc: Book a 15-minute call to see how CredSure can transform your credentialing program.

cliniIndia.title: Clini INDIA digitises
cliniIndia.subtitle: A national healthcare training network certified 500+ medical professionals with instant verification and full regulatory compliance.
cliniIndia.aboutP1: Clini INDIA is one of the country's largest networks of clinical research and healthcare training institutes. They certify thousands of medical professionals annually across pharmacology, clinical trials, and regulatory affairs.
cliniIndia.aboutP2: In a regulated field where credential authenticity directly affects patient safety, Clini INDIA needed a verifiable, fraud-proof system that could integrate with their accreditation workflow.
cliniIndia.aboutP3: CredSure became the digital backbone of their certification program — giving every graduate a credential that hospitals, pharma companies, and regulators can verify in seconds.
cliniIndia.quote1: Verification used to take days of phone calls. With CredSure, employers verify a candidate's credentials in under five seconds — that's a game-changer for our graduates.
cliniIndia.quote2: The blockchain layer gives our regulatory partners the confidence they need. We've cleared every audit since switching to CredSure.
highlights: Full alignment with Indian regulatory bodies
Zero credential fraud incidents to date
CME credit hours encoded in metadata
cliniIndia.challengeDesc: In healthcare, a fake credential can put patients at risk. Clini INDIA was facing a rise in fraudulent certificates and slow manual verification that frustrated graduates and employers alike.
challenges: Manual verification taking days per request
No way for hospitals to bulk-verify new hires
cliniIndia.result1Desc: Automated issuance and self-service verification removed nearly two-thirds of the program's administrative overhead.
cliniIndia.result2Desc: Employers and regulators verify credentials instantly — down from an average of 48 hours via phone and email.
cliniIndia.result3Desc: Healthcare professionals certified through the platform, every one of them with a fraud-proof, instantly shareable credential.
cliniIndia.resultsQuote: Our graduates now carry credentials that employers actually trust — and we have the audit trail to prove it.
cliniIndia.ctaDesc: See how CredSure can deliver instant verification and regulatory-grade trust for your credentials.

tsaaro.title: Tsaaro Academy automates
tsaaro.subtitle: A leading data-privacy training academy automated 100% of certificate issuance and reduced admin workload by 80%.
tsaaro.aboutP1: Tsaaro Academy is the training arm of Tsaaro, a global cybersecurity and data-privacy consultancy. They train thousands of DPOs, privacy officers, and compliance professionals every year on GDPR, DPDP, and ISO frameworks.
tsaaro.aboutP2: With training cohorts running weekly across multiple time zones, the team was drowning in certificate-issuance work — generating, signing, and emailing PDFs by hand for every learner who completed a course.
tsaaro.aboutP3: After integrating CredSure, every Tsaaro Academy graduate receives a blockchain-verified credential the moment they finish a course — no human intervention required.
tsaaro.quote1: Our admin team got back twenty hours a week. That's an entire workday recovered, every single week, for the price of a few coffees per learner.
tsaaro.quote2: Recipients love that they can prove their certification on LinkedIn instantly. Our share rate is the highest we've ever measured.
highlights: Instant employer verification of every certificate
Built-in CPE credit tracking for compliance bodies
tsaaro.benefit1Desc: Credentials are minted automatically the moment a learner completes a course — no admin touch required.
tsaaro.benefit2Desc: One-click LinkedIn sharing puts every graduate's achievement in front of recruiters worldwide.
tsaaro.benefit3Desc: Blockchain-anchored proofs give employers and auditors the confidence they need in seconds.
tsaaro.ctaDesc: See how CredSure can give your admin team back their week — and your graduates a credential they'll actually share.
